'''Canny Mandary Bertar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Mrlssi]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who served as [[Chairman/Legends|chair]] of the [[Senate Dispensation Committee]] and represented [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] and the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] to the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]]. She later joined the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and served in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] from [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="CatCW" />
